description_long: This is a compact, rectangular handbag with a sleek, modern design, predominantly finished in matte black. The front features a triangular flap with a single, round metallic button or snap at its center, serving as the closure. The sides are sharply angled, giving the bag a geometric, envelope-like appearance. The back is plain and unadorned, maintaining the minimalist aesthetic. The material appears to be a sturdy synthetic or leather, with a hard, structured form. There are no visible straps, handles, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing its understated, functional style.
description: A small, matte black, envelope-style handbag with a triangular flap and a central metallic snap closure, featuring a minimalist, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the triangular flap with a central metallic snap, highlighting the envelope-style closure.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the bag's slim profile and sharply angled edges, with the flap slightly protruding.
description_view_2: Back view is plain and featureless, emphasizing the bag's minimalist, rectangular shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the same slim, angular profile and flap extension.
attribute_strap_type: none visible; no handles or straps attached
attribute_closure_mechanism: Single metallic snap button located at the center of the front flap
